description: Simple task management app with CRUD operations
prompt: Build a task management app where users can create, view, edit, and delete tasks. Each task has a title, description, status (todo, in-progress, done), and due date.
semanticExpectations: Has a Task entity with title, description, status, and dueDate fields
Status field is an enum with values: todo, in-progress, done
Includes CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete) for tasks
Has a page at /tasks for managing tasks
Uses appropriate patterns like entity-table and form-section
